translation_findings.jp: ア．BPR / イ．DFD / ウ．MRP / エ．WBS
translation_findings.zh: A. BPR（业务流程再造） / B. DFD（数据流图） / C. MRP（物料需求计划） / D. WBS（工作分解结构）
translation_findings.en: A. BPR (Business Process Reengineering) / B. DFD (Data Flow Diagram) / C. MRP (Material Requirements Planning) / D. WBS (Work Breakdown Structure)
translation_findings.issue: JP source choices are bare acronyms (just 'BPR', 'DFD', 'MRP', 'WBS'). Both zh and en add Chinese/English expansions in parentheses. This is a glossary-style learner aid, not a contradiction or hallucination — the expansions are correct definitions of the standard IT terms. Symmetric expansion zh↔en. WARN-level note because it deviates from JP source literally, but the addition is pedagogically defensible. Not release-impacting (no answer ambiguity introduced; q3 answer = B/DFD is preserved).
translation_findings.suggested_fix: If strict JP fidelity is required, drop the parenthetical glosses. Otherwise OK as learner aid (consistent across zh+en).

translation_findings.jp: BPRに関する記述として、適切なものはどれか。（平成28年度）
translation_findings.zh: 关于BPR（业务流程再造）的描述，恰当的是哪一项？（平成28年度）
translation_findings.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of BPR (Business Process Reengineering)? (FY Heisei 28)
translation_findings.issue: Same as above: stem adds parenthetical BPR expansion in both zh and en (symmetric). Defensible learner aid. JP era marker 平成28年度 is preserved in zh ('平成28年度') and EN ('FY Heisei 28') — consistent treatment across all four questions (平成21年度→FY Heisei 21, 令和3年度→FY Reiwa 3, 平成24年度→FY Heisei 24, 平成28年度→FY Heisei 28). No leak/no conversion to Western calendar — appropriate preservation of source provenance.

narrative: 4 question entities × (stem + 4 choices) × jp/zh/en = 60 leaves. All semantic content faithfully translated: '情報戦略を策定する' → '制定信息战略' / 'formulating an information strategy'; '経営戦略との整合性' → '与经营战略的一致性' / 'Consistency with Management Strategy'; 'エンタープライズサーチ → enterprise search' correct, with the long zh/en versions of the four choices (定型/非定型→structured/unstructured, 自然言語処理→natural language processing, 光学的に読み取り→optically read, あるべき企業の姿→To-Be State of the enterprise) all matching JP semantics. Era markers 平成/令和 preserved symmetrically. Choice markers correct (jp ア-エ, zh A-D, en A-D). WARN-level polish only: zh+en both add parenthetical expansions of acronyms BPR/DFD/MRP/WBS in q3 and BPR in q4 stem — these are symmetric learner aids, not translation defects.
